executedWork.summary: Recorded source-linked P12 dogfood evidence: CHANGELOG.md
Updated source readiness with the completed dogfood and explicit MCP transport blocker.
Updated P12 specialization evidence and the compact MCP follow-up.
Closed verified Phase 790 dogfood checks and kept fresh MCP transport pending.
Recorded measured dogfood outcomes and the remaining transport gap.
Restored keyboard focus to the active Website Console navigation target after rerender.
Locked responsive navigation, focus restoration, and focus-ring behavior with focused tests.
Kept responsive navigation in one scrollable row and raised the focus ring to AA contrast.
Added the real-pilot case to the documentation navigation.
Published the claim-bounded internal pilot case with measured evidence.

verificationResults.summary: All 25 Website Console focused contract tests passed.
The full release gate passed with 815 tests, 8 strict audits, 766 packaged files, warning-free docs, and installed-bin plus one-shot package smoke.

observations.summary: Keyboard navigation reaches every tab, scrolls the last tab into view, restores focus after activation, retains a 3px focus ring above 5.6:1 contrast, and keeps 44px targets.
Desktop retains the sticky grid sidebar; 390px mobile uses one 52px scrollable navigation row with no body overflow and visible work content in the first viewport.
Chrome Playwright runs completed with zero console errors and warnings, five repeated activations, reverse keyboard navigation, and reduced-motion preference enabled.
Website Console preserved and re-exported all 416,114 P12 source bytes with an unchanged SHA-256, then restored P11 after clear.
After the case study count was corrected, package inventory passed at 766 files and MkDocs passed with zero warnings and errors.
